question: Which students are enrolled in course 3 and have an email address on record?
sql: SELECT id, name, course, phone_number, email, group_id FROM `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_033815_schema`.`students` WHERE course = 3 AND email IS NOT NULL AND email <> ''

question: List all subjects that have more than 60 hours assigned.
sql: SELECT id, name, hours_number FROM `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_033815_schema`.`subjects` WHERE hours_number > 60

question: Show each student's name along with the name of their group.
sql: SELECT s.id, s.name AS student_name, g.name AS group_name FROM `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_033815_schema`.`students` s JOIN `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_033815_schema`.`groups_table` g ON s.group_id = g.id

question: List each lesson's UUID together with the name of the subject it covers and the lesson type name.
sql: SELECT l.uuid, sub.name AS subject_name, lt.name AS lesson_type_name FROM `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_033815_schema`.`lessons` l JOIN `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_033815_schema`.`subjects` sub ON l.subject_id = sub.id JOIN `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_033815_schema`.`lesson_types` lt ON l.lesson_type = lt.id

question: What is the average grade per subject, ordered by average grade descending?
sql: SELECT p.subject_id, sub.name AS subject_name, AVG(p.grade) AS avg_grade FROM `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_033815_schema`.`progress` p JOIN `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_033815_schema`.`subjects` sub ON p.subject_id = sub.id GROUP BY p.subject_id, sub.name ORDER BY avg_grade DESC

question: How many lessons has each teacher taught, and what are their names?
sql: SELECT t.id, t.name AS teacher_name, COUNT(l.uuid) AS lesson_count FROM `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_033815_schema`.`teachers` t LEFT JOIN `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_033815_schema`.`lessons` l ON t.id = l.teacher_id GROUP BY t.id, t.name ORDER BY lesson_count DESC
